reviews.comment:
Sólo combustible, si queres comer algo no tienen casi nada te mandan a un boliche que esta a unos 100 metros del lugar muy poco serio por ser del ACA pobre los socios .
Es decir servicio cero 🥺

(Translated by Google)
Just fuel; if you want something to eat, they have almost nothing and send you to a bar about 100 meters away—very unprofessional, considering it's an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) location. Poor members.
In other words, zero service 🥺
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOMWJETHNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tienen que poner un servicio más amplio de autoservicio comidas lo demás todo genial

(Translated by Google)
They need to offer a wider self-service food service; otherwise, everything is great.
